title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS504-4XQ-OUT
description: Outdoor 4-port QSFP28 fanless switch with fins on the back and routing options offers Gigabit Ethernet for management or PoE IN power supply (43 to 57 V DC or 802.3 bt), 4 optical QSFP28 ports with speed 1/10/25/40 and 100 Gbps, console RJ45 port, DC connector and terminal block with power supply 43 to 57 V DC . The Switch has a very robust chassis with water protection IP66 , the possibility of installation on a wall or a mast, and in the lower part there are doors for 4 cross-head screws and… Device Gigabit PoE injector Power adapter 48V/0.95A Wall brackets, screws Metal pull buckle
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (4) 100G Serial port RJ45 Power Power over Ethernet 802.3bt, 43 .. 57V DC Power type PoE, DC connector, DC terminal PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 38 Power via connector/terminal 36 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Protection class IP66 Design Outdoor Fans No Chassis design Plastic Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 200 Height [mm] 330 Depth [mm] 70 Hardware CPU QCA9531 CPU frequency [MHz] 650 CPU cores 1 Internal storage [MB] 32 RAM [MB] 128 General Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9000
